moduleDescription: internal API for now, API subject to change

entries.name: retryCall
entries.code: template retryCall(maxRetry = 3; backoffDuration = 1.0; call: untyped): bool
entries.description: Retry call up to maxRetry times with exponential backoff and initial duraton of backoffDuration seconds. This is in particular useful for network commands that can fail.

entries.name: isGitRepo
entries.code:
proc isGitRepo(dir: string): bool {.raises: [], tags: [ReadDirEffect],
                                    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Avoid calling git since it depends on /bin/sh existing and fails in Nix.

entries.name: diffFiles
entries.description: Returns a human readable diff of files path1, path2, the exact form of which is implementation defined.

entries.name: diffStrings

pragmas:
tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, WriteDirEffect, ExecIOEffect,
       RootEffect]

entries.description: Returns a human readable diff of a, b, the exact form of which is implementation defined. See also experimental.diff.
